summary: Executed backend pytest regression and frontend end-to-end validation for landing, booking, worker signup, contact, admin auth, dashboard overview, and booking status update.

ui_bugs.issue: Observed one flaky run showing runtime overlay: 'ResizeObserver loop completed with undelivered notifications' which blocked progression to step 3.

action_items: Investigate and stabilize intermittent ResizeObserver runtime overlay in frontend to avoid blocked booking progression.
Optionally add an error boundary / safe ResizeObserver handling to prevent dev-overlay interruption in booking flow.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py uses synchronous requests.post inside async endpoints for Twilio/SendGrid calls; under load this can block the event loop. Consider async HTTP client (httpx.AsyncClient).
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_* bookings/workers/contacts via API and UI flows during validation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend public/admin endpoints passed (7/7). Full UI flow passed on rerun including booking status update to completed; one earlier flaky runtime-overlay incident occurred during booking step transition.
rca of the issue: Flaky UI interruption likely due frontend runtime handling of ResizeObserver warning escalated to overlay in one run. Reproduced once during fast multi-step booking transitions; not reproduced in focused booking probe and full rerun.
